summary: Legislation Currency feature testing complete. All 20 unit tests pass. Backend APIs working correctly (GET dashboard, jurisdiction filter, mark-verified, AI check with guardrails). Frontend page loads with all required elements (forensic notice, filter buttons, status badges, AI check dialog, mark verified functionality). Anti-hallucination guardrails verified working - AI responses correctly show 'cannot_verify' status with low confidence and proper forensic caveats.
critical_code_review_comments: Registry correctly has 79 Acts across 9 jurisdictions (nsw:13, vic:10, qld:9, sa:9, wa:9, tas:8, nt:8, act:8, cth:5)
Anti-hallucination guardrails properly implemented in _validate_ai_response - rejects first-person pronouns, generic filler, invalid status/confidence, missing keys
AI check correctly returns 'cannot_verify' with 'low' confidence when model cannot confirm currency
Forensic caveat is properly overwritten by service with authoritative wording
Mark verified correctly writes to framework_audit_log and updates verification_source to 'audit_log'
Export footer includes 'Legal Framework v2026.02 · 79 Australian Acts manually verified · criminallawappealmanagement.com.au'
Admin dashboard has Legislation Currency link and self-hosted footer as required
seed_data_creation: None required - registry is static data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legislation Currency feature fully tested. 79 Acts in registry. Anti-hallucination guardrails working. AI check returns 'cannot_verify' with low confidence as expected. Mark verified updates audit_log correctly.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/legislation-currency: Returns 79 Acts with totals, buckets, forensic_notice
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/legislation-currency/ai-: Returns AI response with guardrails, forensic caveat overwritten

frontend_elements.admin-selfhosted-footer: Self-hosted · your OpenAI key · your Google OAuth · criminallawappealmanagement.com.au

features_verified.export_footer: Legal Framework v2026.02 · 79 Australian Acts manually verified · criminallawappealmanagement.com.au
